results.rendered_html:
snānīya a. [snānāya hitaṃ cha] Fit or suitable for bathing or ablution, worn during bathing; snānīyavastrakriyayā patrorṇaṃ vopayujyate  M. 5. 12. 
— ya Water or any other article (such
(pb) as ungneutsunguents, perfumed powders &c.) proper for bathing;  R. 16. 21.
